generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our reliance on global supply chains to undermine our national security? By pushing for strategic autonomy, we can protect our critical infrastructure and ensure that our defense systems are not vulnerable to foreign interference. Don't let them take advantage of our openness—it's time to prioritize our security over short-term economic gains. #StrategicAutonomy #NationalSecurity
